title: ldapsearch
html:
ldapsearch

> Raw LDAP queries for AD enumeration. Use when you need specific attributes or BloodHound misses edge cases.

Base Queries

# Anonymous bind - get naming contexts
ldapsearch -x -H ldap://DC_IP -b '' -s base namingContexts

# Authenticated bind
ldapsearch -x -H ldap://DC_IP -D 'user@domain.htb' -w 'pass' -b 'DC=domain,DC=htb'

User Enumeration

# All users with key attributes
ldapsearch ... -b 'DC=domain,DC=htb' '(objectClass=user)' sAMAccountName memberOf description userAccountControl adminCount servicePrincipalName

# Users with SPNs (Kerberoastable)
ldapsearch ... '(&(objectClass=user)(servicePrincipalName=*))' sAMAccountName servicePrincipalName

# AS-REP roastable (no preauth required)
ldapsearch ... '(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=4194304)' sAMAccountName

# Disabled accounts
ldapsearch ... '(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2)' sAMAccountName

Computer Enumeration

ldapsearch ... '(objectClass=computer)' dNSHostName operatingSystem managedBy msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity

Group Enumeration

# Recursive membership
ldapsearch ... '(member:1.2.840.113556.1.4.1941:=CN=User,CN=Users,DC=domain,DC=htb)' dn

Delegation

# Constrained delegation
ldapsearch ... '(msDS-AllowedToDelegateTo=*)' sAMAccountName msDS-AllowedToDelegateTo

# Unconstrained delegation (excluding DCs)
ldapsearch ... '(&(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=524288)(!(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=8192)))' sAMAccountName

# RBCD
ldapsearch ... '(msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity=*)' sAMAccountName

Special Attributes

# LAPS passwords
ldapsearch ... '(objectClass=computer)' ms-Mcs-AdmPwd msLAPS-Password

# gMSA accounts
ldapsearch ... '(objectClass=msDS-GroupManagedServiceAccount)' sAMAccountName msDS-GroupMSAMembership

# RODC revealed users
ldapsearch ... '(objectClass=computer)' msDS-RevealedUsers msDS-NeverRevealGroup msDS-RevealOnDemandGroup
excerpt: ldapsearch > Raw LDAP queries for AD enumeration. Use when you need specific attributes or BloodHound misses edge cases. Base Queries # Anonymous bind - get naming contexts ldapsearch -x -H ldap://…
